expectations.text: Catastrophic over-flagging guard: human prose should not produce more than 12 distinct flags
Any flag present shows a quoted phrase from the input
expectations.evidence: all 5 flag block(s) anchor to input

expectations.text: Any flag present has a brief 'why' explanation
Output ends with a question offering suggestions / rewrite / done
expectations.evidence: final line: Want Suggestions for per-flag replacements or a Rewrite at a chosen depth?

expectations.text: Output does not contain a rewritten version of the input draft
expectations.evidence: no rewrite or draft block present

expectations.text: Any patterns flagged on this human draft are genuinely worth surfacing, not over-eager false positives
expectations.evidence: Qualitative assertion deferred to Mae in the review viewer.

needs_review: Qualitative assertions are intentionally left for human review.

eval_feedback.overall: Programmatic checks were graded by adapter code; qualitative assertions should be reviewed in the viewer.
